methods.description: Procedure for extracting whole genomic DNA from tissue samples using a commercial kit and preparing it for downstream applications like PCR.

steps.description: We extracted whole genomic DNA from ethanolpreserved liver, muscle, or toe clips using DNeasy Tissue kits (Qiagen, Valencia, CA, USA), following manufacturer's protocols.
steps.searchable_summary: Extract genomic DNA from tissue samples using DNeasy Tissue kit.
inputs: Ethanol-preserved liver, muscle, or toe clips

steps.description: Genomic DNA was eluted in 200 lL buffer for use as template in polymerase chain reaction (PCR) amplifications.
steps.searchable_summary: Elute extracted genomic DNA in buffer for use as PCR template.

methods.description: Procedure for amplifying specific mitochondrial gene fragments using PCR and sequencing them using Sanger sequencing on a genetic analyzer.

steps.description: We amplified and sequenced three mitochondrial gene fragments: (i) the control region and a short segment of the adjacent cytochrome b gene (hereafter referred to as control region fragment, 1024 bp), (ii) the complete NADH dehydrogenase subunit 1 and the adjacent tRNA Leu and tRNA Ile , and partial sequences of the flanking tRNA Gln
steps.searchable_summary: Amplify specific mitochondrial gene fragments (control region, cytochrome b, ND1, tRNAs) using PCR.

steps.description: We used the same sequencing primers used in the original amplifications, with the exception of internal sequencing primers designed for the ND1 and ND2 fragments (Table 2).
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare amplified DNA fragments for sequencing using specific sequencing primers.
inputs: Sequencing primers (original amplification primers, internal ND1/ND2 primers)

steps.description: We sequenced each gene in both directions to avoid base-calling ambiguities.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform bidirectional Sanger sequencing of amplified DNA fragments.

steps.description: Products were column purified to remove non-incorporated terminator dye using SephadexÔ G-50 and electrophoresed on an ABI 3100 Genetic Analyzer (Applied Biosystems).
steps.searchable_summary: Purify sequencing products and perform electrophoresis on ABI 3100 Genetic Analyzer.

methods.description: Procedure for checking the quality of raw sequencing data and assembling forward and reverse reads into contiguous sequences.

steps.searchable_summary: Manually inspect raw sequencing electropherograms for quality.

steps.description: Contiguous sequences for each fragment were assembled using SEQUENCHER version 4.1 (GeneCodes, Ann Arbor, MI, USA).
steps.searchable_summary: Assemble forward and reverse sequence reads into contiguous sequences using SEQUENCHER software.
outputs: Assembled contiguous DNA sequences for each fragment
